name: RimWorld
description: In-game Harmony mod pushes full colony state on every save — colonists, resources, research, mood, health, defenses, farming, factions, and more
limitations: Modded content (added stats, custom hediffs) not yet parsed — vanilla data only
Large colonies (30+ colonists) may cause brief frame hitch during data collection

combat.name: Weapon & Armor Combat Calculator
combat.description: Compute ranged DPS at any distance (accuracy interpolation across 4 range breakpoints), melee true DPS via weighted verb selection, and armor damage reduction expected values.

armor.description: Target armor rating (0-2, e.g. 1.0 = flak vest)

range.description: Distance in tiles for ranged DPS

crops.name: Crop Production Optimizer
crops.description: Compute nutrition/day/tile and silver/day/tile for any crop on any soil type, accounting for fertility sensitivity, temperature growth curves, and rest periods. Includes tiles-per-colonist estimates.

colonists.description: Number of colonists to feed (for tiles calculation)

crop.description: Crop name (e.g. rice, potato, corn, strawberry, devilstrand)

soil.description: Soil type (e.g. soil, rich soil, gravel, hydroponics)

drugs.name: Drug Economy & Addiction Analyzer
drugs.description: Compute silver/day for drug production chains (crop to processed drug), silver per raw material, and addiction risk data including tolerance thresholds and safe dose intervals.

drug.description: Drug name (e.g. flake, yayo, beer, smokeleaf joint). Omit to list all.

soil.description: Soil type for production chain (e.g. soil, rich soil, gravel)

temperature.description: Average temperature for production chain calculation

genes.name: Gene Metabolism & Xenotype Builder
genes.description: Validate xenogerm builds against complexity and metabolism budgets, detect gene conflicts via exclusion tags, and tally archite capsule requirements.
Array of gene names to validate as a build

search.description: Search genes by name or description substring

materials.name: Material & Item Stat Lookup
materials.description: Look up final stats for any item-material-quality combination using the three-layer multiplication: base stat, material factor, and quality multiplier.

material.description: Material name (e.g. steel, plasteel, hyperweave). Omit to list all.

quality.description: Quality level: awful, poor, normal, good, excellent, masterwork, legendary

raids.name: Colony Wealth & Raid Threat Estimator
raids.description: Convert colony wealth to expected raid points using the piecewise wealth curve from StorytellerUtility, with per-colonist point scaling and building wealth at 50% factor.

research.name: Research Tree & Crafting Chain Navigator
research.description: Traverse research prerequisite chains with total costs, applying tech level multipliers for tribal starts. Includes research speed estimation.

colony_tech.description: Colony tech level for cost multipliers

project.description: Research project name. Omit to list all.

surgery.name: Surgery Success Calculator
surgery.description: Calculate true surgery success probability from surgeon skill, bed type, quality, room cleanliness, medicine, and operation difficulty. Implements the exact formula from Recipe_Surgery.CheckSurgeryFail.

bed.description: Bed type: sleeping spot, bed, hospital bed, ancient bed, rusted bed

bed_factor.description: Direct bed factor override (alternative to bed name)

inspired.description: Whether the surgeon has Inspired Surgery

medicine.description: Medicine type: none, herbal, industrial/medicine, glitterworld

quality.description: Bed quality: awful, poor, normal, good, excellent, masterwork, legendary
